hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(adoc|md)$' && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -q '/docs/' && exit 0; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Source file changed. If user-facing behavior changed, consider updating README.adoc or docs/pages/user-guide.adoc."}}'
